sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT schema_name, table_name, row_count, is_active FROM metadata.table_registry WHERE environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' AND status = ''', pipeline().parameters.table_filter, ''' AND batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, '''')
@concat('SELECT * FROM ', item().schema_name, '.', item().table_name, ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, '''')

pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: conditional_pipeline_parameter_override_deep (Deeply nested conditions that override pipeline parameters based on complex runtime logic)

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT batch_id, status, table_name, row_count FROM batch_metadata WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' ORDER BY table_name')
@concat('SELECT * FROM ', pipeline().parameters.env, '.dbo.', item(), ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND modified_date >= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE())')

@concat('SELECT r.id, r.payload, r.nested_path, r.status_code, r.schema_version, r.processed_at FROM dbo.api_response_staging r WHERE r.environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' AND r.root_path = ''', pipeline().parameters.json_root_path, ''' AND r.status_code = ''', pipeline().parameters.expected_status, ''' AND r.processing_flag = ''', variables('final_processing_flag'), ''' ORDER BY r.processed_at DESC')

pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: nested_json_path_condition_evaluator (Deeply nested conditions parsing JSON response paths with complex property access expressions)

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT r.id, r.payload, r.nested_path, r.status_code, r.schema_version, r.processed_at FROM dbo.api_response_staging r WHERE r.environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' AND r.root_path = ''', pipeline().parameters.json_root_path, ''' AND r.status_code = ''', pipeline().parameters.expected_status, ''' AND r.processing_flag = ''', variables('final_processing_flag'), ''' ORDER BY r.processed_at DESC')

@concat('SELECT TOP 1 last_watermark, last_run_date, last_row_count FROM ', pipeline().parameters.watermark_table, ' WHERE table_name = ''', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ''' AND environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' ORDER BY last_run_date DESC')

@concat('SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_row_count, MAX(modified_date) AS max_modified_date FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE modified_date > ''', activity('LookupWatermark').output.firstRow.last_watermark, '''')

body.value: @json(concat('{"text": "Pipeline skipped for ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, '. Row count: ', activity('LookupSourceRowCount').output.firstRow.new_row_count, ', Lag below threshold."}'))

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT * FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE modified_date > ''', activity('LookupWatermark').output.firstRow.last_watermark, ''' AND modified_date <= ''', variables('current_watermark'), ''' ORDER BY modified_date ASC')

pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: deep_conditional_watermark_management (Watermark comparison logic with deeply nested conditions comparing dates and row counts)

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT TOP 1 last_watermark, last_run_date, last_row_count FROM ', pipeline().parameters.watermark_table, ' WHERE table_name = ''', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ''' AND environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' ORDER BY last_run_date DESC')

@concat('SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_row_count, MAX(modified_date) AS max_modified_date FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE modified_date > ''', activity('LookupWatermark').output.firstRow.last_watermark, '''')

body.value: @json(concat('{"text": "Pipeline skipped for ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, '. Row count: ', activity('LookupSourceRowCount').output.firstRow.new_row_count, ', Lag below threshold."}'))

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT * FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE modified_date > ''', activity('LookupWatermark').output.firstRow.last_watermark, ''' AND modified_date <= ''', variables('current_watermark'), ''' ORDER BY modified_date ASC')

@concat('SELECT * FROM file_registry WHERE container = ''', pipeline().parameters.source_container, ''' AND file_name LIKE ''', replace(replace(pipeline().parameters.file_pattern, '_', '%_'), '.csv', '%.csv'), ''' AND environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' AND status = ''active''')

body.value: @json(concat('{"pipeline":"', pipeline().Pipeline, '","matched_pattern":"', variables('matched_pattern'), '","is_valid":"', variables('is_valid_file'), '","source":"', pipeline().parameters.source_container, '","target":"', pipeline().parameters.target_container, '","file_pattern":"', pipeline().parameters.file_pattern, '","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","run_id":"', pipeline().RunId, '"}'))

body.value: @json(concat('{"pipeline":"', pipeline().Pipeline, '","matched_pattern":"', variables('matched_pattern'), '","is_valid":"', variables('is_valid_file'), '","source":"', pipeline().parameters.source_container, '","target":"', pipeline().parameters.target_container, '","file_pattern":"', pipeline().parameters.file_pattern, '","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","run_id":"', pipeline().RunId, '"}'))

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT batch_status, record_count, priority, sla_target_minutes FROM dbo.batch_control WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND source_system = ''', pipeline().parameters.source_system, ''' AND env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, '''')
@concat('SELECT * FROM dbo.staging_', pipeline().parameters.source_system, ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND status = ''TRANSFORMED'' AND record_count > 0')

body.value: @json(concat('{"batch_id":"', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, '","correlation_id":"', pipeline().parameters.correlation_id, '","source_system":"', pipeline().parameters.source_system, '","target_system":"', pipeline().parameters.target_system, '","status":"SUCCESS","record_count":', string(activity('LookupBatchMetadata').output.firstRow.record_count), ',"sla_minutes":', string(pipeline().parameters.sla_minutes), ',"env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","lookup_status":"', variables('lookup_status'), '"}'))
